advanceTab.subTitle: How it works
advanceTab.title: Start a conversation with BoomAI
advanceTab.desc: Simply type your request in natural language. BoomAI understands context and delivers precise results whether you need text, images, or code.

advanceTab.subTitle: Boost efficiency
advanceTab.title: Automate repetitive creative tasks
advanceTab.desc: Save hours each week by letting BoomAI handle first drafts, boilerplate code, and visual prototypes so you can focus on what matters most.

advanceTab.subTitle: Grow faster
advanceTab.title: Produce more content without growing your team
advanceTab.desc: Whether you need 10 blog posts or 100 product images, BoomAI scales with your needs. Consistent quality at any volume.

advanceTab.subTitle: Enterprise ready
advanceTab.title: Built with security and privacy in mind
advanceTab.desc: Your data stays yours. BoomAI uses enterprise-grade encryption and never trains on your private content. SOC 2 compliant.
